technology.title: Elon Musk's AI tool Grok was used in strikes against Iran, says U.S. government
technology.summary: At the end of February, the U.S. government terminated its contracts with Anthropic after it refused to allow its tools to be used for fully automated strikes or the mass surveillance of Americans

briefing.news_focus: At the end of February, the U.S. government terminated its contracts with Anthropic after it refused to allow its tools to be used for fully automated strikes or the mass surveillance of Americans
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國政府指出，Elon Musk的AI工具Grok在對伊朗的攻擊行動中被使用。這一消息引發了對AI技術在軍事應用中倫理性的討論。美國政府在二月底終止了與Anthropic的合約，因為該公司拒絕允許其工具用於完全自動化的攻擊或對美國人的大規模監控。
briefing.background: 在當前的國際安全環境中，AI技術的應用越來越受到重視，特別是在軍事領域。美國政府對於AI在軍事行動中的使用持謹慎態度，尤其是在涉及自動化武器系統的情況下。Anthropic作為一家專注於AI安全的公司，其拒絕讓其工具用於自動化攻擊，反映了業界對於AI倫理的高度關注。這一事件也顯示出政府與科技公司之間在技術應用上的緊張關係，特別是在涉及國家安全的議題上。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件揭示了美國政府與科技公司之間的複雜互動。美國政府希望利用AI技術提升軍事效率，但同時也必須考量倫理與法律的界限。Grok的使用引發了對於AI在軍事行動中角色的質疑，尤其是在自動化攻擊的可接受性方面。Anthropic的拒絕顯示出科技公司對於其技術可能帶來的後果的擔憂，並可能影響未來政府與私營部門在AI應用上的合作模式。隨著AI技術的快速發展，未來可能會出現更多類似的爭議，特別是在軍事與監控的交集處。

technology.title: As ByteDance spends billions on AI, which Chinese chip start-ups stand to gain?
technology.summary: As Chinese technology giant ByteDance accelerates its shift towards domestic chips for artificial intelligence workloads, a few smaller domestic suppliers stand to benefit – if they can deliver at scale amid a void left by Nvidia due to regulatory hurdles. The Beijing-based owner of TikTok is considering turning to a handful of so-called tier-two chipmakers in China – smaller rivals to Huawei Technologies and Cambricon Technologies – for its cloud infrastructure, according to sources and...

briefing.news_focus: As Chinese technology giant ByteDance accelerates its shift towards domestic chips for artificial intelligence workloads, a few smaller domestic suppliers stand to benefit – if they can deliver at scale amid a void left by Nvidia due to regulatory hurdles. The Beijing-based owner of TikTok is considering turning to a handful of so-called tier-two chipmakers in China – smaller rivals to Huawei Technologies and Cambricon Technologies – for its cloud infrastructure, according to sources and...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國科技巨頭字節跳動（ByteDance）正在加速向國產芯片轉型，以滿足其人工智慧（AI）工作負載的需求。由於英偉達（Nvidia）面臨監管障礙，字節跳動考慮向一些較小的中國二級芯片製造商尋求支持，這些製造商是華為技術（Huawei Technologies）和寒武紀科技（Cambricon Technologies）的競爭對手，可能會從中受益。
briefing.background: 隨著中國政府推動科技自主化，特別是在半導體產業方面，字節跳動的轉型反映了更廣泛的市場趨勢。中國對外部技術依賴的減少，尤其是在AI和雲計算領域，促使企業尋求本土解決方案。字節跳動作為一家領先的科技公司，其對國產芯片的需求增加，將可能促進中國芯片初創企業的發展，尤其是在面對外部供應商如英偉達的挑戰時。
briefing.analysis: 字節跳動的策略轉變可能會對中國的半導體生態系統產生深遠影響。由於英偉達的監管障礙，市場上出現了對國產芯片的需求空缺，這為中國的二級芯片製造商提供了機會。然而，這些小型供應商需要克服規模生產的挑戰，以滿足字節跳動的需求。各方利益關係中，字節跳動希望降低對外部供應商的依賴，而二級芯片製造商則希望借此機會擴大市場份額。若這些小型企業能成功交付，將有助於提升中國在全球半導體市場的競爭力。

technology.title: Gig workers are endlessly exploited. AI could make more of us share their fate
technology.summary: As companies integrate AI and hire fewer employees, a shift toward a ‘gig economy’ will commence In 2024, the buy-now-pay-later company Klarna announced that it would cut hundreds of customer service roles and begin using an artificial intelligence chatbot instead. The move was expected to save the company millions. But a year later, after customers complained about the degraded quality of customer service, Klarna began to quietly recruit human customer service agents back. At first glance, the reversal appeared to be a victory for human workers in the age of AI. The reality was more complex. Instead of bringing on full-time customer service agents, who Klarna contracts through an outside agency, it instead brought on workers in what Klarna CEO Sebastian Siemiatkowski has described as “an Uber type of set-up”. Now, an AI chatbot continues to handle most of customers’ basic queries, while a growing number of gig workers handle the more advanced ones. “Just like somebody can go and drive an Uber for a while, they can actually jump on and work for Klarna’s customer service,” Siemiatkowski said on a podcast in February. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: As companies integrate AI and hire fewer employees, a shift toward a ‘gig economy’ will commence In 2024, the buy-now-pay-later company Klarna announced that it would cut hundreds of customer service roles and begin using an artificial intelligence chatbot instead. The move was expected to save the company millions. But a year later, after customers complained about the degraded quality of customer service, Klarna began to quietly recruit human customer service agents back. At first glance, the reversal appeared to be a victory for human workers in the age of AI. The reality was more complex. Instead of bringing on full-time customer service agents, who Klarna contracts through an outside agency, it instead brought on workers in what Klarna CEO Sebastian Siemiatkowski has described as “an Uber type of set-up”. Now, an AI chatbot continues to handle most of customers’ basic queries, while a growing number of gig workers handle the more advanced ones. “Just like somebody can go and drive an Uber for a while, they can actually jump on and work for Klarna’s customer service,” Siemiatkowski said on a podcast in February. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: Klarna宣布將裁減數百名客戶服務人員，並以人工智慧聊天機器人取而代之，預計可為公司節省數百萬美元。然而，隨著顧客對服務品質的抱怨增加，Klarna開始悄悄地重新招募人力，但並非全職員工，而是以類似Uber的方式聘用臨時工，這使得更多人可能面臨類似於零工經濟的命運。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的快速發展，越來越多的企業選擇自動化其客戶服務流程，這一趨勢在疫情後更為明顯。Klarna作為一家買後付款的金融科技公司，面臨著成本控制的壓力，因此選擇使用AI來取代傳統的客服人員。這一決策反映了當前市場對於靈活用工模式的需求增加，尤其是在科技驅動的業務環境中，企業希望通過降低固定成本來提高競爭力。
briefing.analysis: Klarna的這一決策引發了對於零工經濟未來的擔憂。雖然重新招募人力似乎是一種對顧客反饋的回應，但實際上，這些新聘用的工人並非全職，而是以靈活的方式工作，這意味著他們的工作保障和福利將大幅降低。這種模式可能會導致更多的勞動者面臨不穩定的工作狀況，並加劇社會對於勞動權益的討論。Klarna的CEO提到的“Uber型設置”顯示出企業在追求成本效益的同時，可能會忽視員工的長期福祉，這在未來可能引發更大的社會反彈。

politics.title: Israel’s foreign minister cuts ties with top EU diplomat over ‘apartheid’ remark
politics.summary: Israel’s foreign minister said on Thursday that he was severing all contact with the European Union’s top diplomat Kaja Kallas over reported remarks in which she allegedly compared Israel to the apartheid regime that once ruled South Africa. Diplomatic relations between Israel and the EU have come under heavy strain since the Gaza war erupted in October 2023, as well as over violence by Israeli settlers towards Palestinians in the occupied West Bank. On Thursday, Gideon Saar accused EU foreign...

briefing.news_focus: Israel’s foreign minister said on Thursday that he was severing all contact with the European Union’s top diplomat Kaja Kallas over reported remarks in which she allegedly compared Israel to the apartheid regime that once ruled South Africa. Diplomatic relations between Israel and the EU have come under heavy strain since the Gaza war erupted in October 2023, as well as over violence by Israeli settlers towards Palestinians in the occupied West Bank. On Thursday, Gideon Saar accused EU foreign...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 以色列外交部長基多恩·薩爾宣布與歐盟外交事務首席代表卡佳·卡拉斯斷絕所有聯繫，原因是卡拉斯被報導比較以色列與曾經統治南非的種族隔離政權。自2023年10月加薩戰爭爆發以來，以色列與歐盟的外交關係受到嚴重壓力，尤其是以色列定居者對巴勒斯坦人暴力事件的影響。
briefing.background: 自2023年加薩戰爭爆發以來，以色列與歐盟之間的關係急劇惡化。歐盟對以色列在加薩地區的軍事行動及其對巴勒斯坦人權利的侵犯表示關切，並對以色列定居者在約旦河西岸的暴力行為表示譴責。這些事件使得雙方的外交互動變得緊張，尤其是在歐盟對以色列政策的批評聲音日益增強的背景下。卡拉斯的言論被視為對以色列政策的直接挑戰，進一步加劇了雙方的對立。
briefing.analysis: 以色列外交部長基多恩·薩爾的決定反映了以色列對外界批評的敏感性，特別是在與歐盟的關係上。以色列政府可能視卡拉斯的言論為對其國家形象的攻擊，並可能加強其對外政策的強硬立場。另一方面，歐盟則可能會繼續對以色列的行為施加壓力，尤其是在巴勒斯坦人權問題上。參考報導未提供與此事件直接相關的細節，但顯示出其他國家在外交關係上的動態，顯示出國際政治中各方利益的複雜性。此事件可能導致以色列與歐盟之間的進一步隔閡，並影響未來的外交談判。

supporting_titles: Nepal Govt wants stronger ties with India, China: Nepal Foreign Minister Khanal
supporting_summaries: Mr. Khanal's visit to Beijing followed closely on his trip to India during which he said his government would accord “highest priority” to relations with New Delhi

politics.title: Media union blasts Pauline Hanson’s ‘bitter, unprofessional’ attack on Guardian journalist
politics.summary: Union calls for journalists to stand with colleagues when they are targeted by politicians as Anthony Albanese says media organisations play ‘vital roles in our democracy’ Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email , free app or daily news podcast The media union has condemned One Nation leader Pauline Hanson’s attack on Guardian Australia senior correspondent Sarah Martin, as Anthony Albanese called on journalists to defend public broadcasters SBS and the ABC. After her landmark address to the National Press Club in Canberra on Wednesday, Hanson called Martin “trashy” for asking about her daughter Lee Hanson’s employment by a NSW One Nation senator, despite living and working in Tasmania. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Union calls for journalists to stand with colleagues when they are targeted by politicians as Anthony Albanese says media organisations play ‘vital roles in our democracy’ Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email , free app or daily news podcast The media union has condemned One Nation leader Pauline Hanson’s attack on Guardian Australia senior correspondent Sarah Martin, as Anthony Albanese called on journalists to defend public broadcasters SBS and the ABC. After her landmark address to the National Press Club in Canberra on Wednesday, Hanson called Martin “trashy” for asking about her daughter Lee Hanson’s employment by a NSW One Nation senator, despite living and working in Tasmania. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 澳洲媒體工會譴責一國黨領袖保琳·漢森（Pauline Hanson）對《衛報》記者莎拉·馬丁（Sarah Martin）的攻擊，稱其為「苦澀且不專業」。漢森在堪培拉國家新聞俱樂部的演講中，因馬丁詢問其女兒李·漢森（Lee Hanson）在新南威爾士州一國黨參議員的就業問題而指責馬丁「低俗」。澳洲總理安東尼·阿爾巴尼斯（Anthony Albanese）呼籲記者們應該支持公共廣播機構，如SBS和ABC，並強調媒體在民主中的重要角色。
briefing.background: 在澳洲，媒體自由和記者的職業安全一直是重要的政治議題。隨著社交媒體的興起，政治人物與媒體之間的緊張關係愈發明顯。保琳·漢森作為一國黨的領袖，經常發表爭議性言論，這次針對《衛報》記者的攻擊再次引發了對媒體獨立性和記者職業道德的討論。阿爾巴尼斯的呼籲反映了政府對於維護媒體自由的重視，尤其是在面對政治人物的攻擊時，媒體的角色顯得尤為重要。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件突顯了政治人物與媒體之間的緊張關係，尤其是當媒體報導涉及政治人物的家庭或私人生活時。保琳·漢森的攻擊被媒體工會視為對新聞自由的威脅，並可能激勵其他記者在面對類似情況時團結起來，捍衛自身權益。阿爾巴尼斯的支持則可能增強媒體界的士氣，促使更多記者勇於追問政治人物的行為和決策。未來，若此類攻擊持續發生，可能會引發更廣泛的社會討論，並影響公眾對政治人物及其言論的信任程度。

politics.title: Is the G7 hearing the Global South?
politics.summary: The G7, BRICS and emerging powers are competing for influence in a changing global order.

briefing.news_focus: The G7, BRICS and emerging powers are competing for influence in a changing global order.
briefing.news_focus_zh: G7國家正面臨來自全球南方國家的挑戰，這些國家在新興力量的崛起中尋求更大的影響力。隨著全球秩序的變化，G7與金磚國家及其他新興力量之間的競爭愈加激烈，這引發了對G7是否能夠有效聆聽並回應全球南方需求的質疑。
briefing.background: G7由七個主要工業國組成，長期以來在全球經濟和政治事務中佔據主導地位。然而，隨著金磚國家（巴西、俄羅斯、印度、中國和南非）及其他新興經濟體的崛起，全球南方國家的聲音日益增強，對G7的影響力構成挑戰。這些新興力量不僅在經濟上逐漸崛起，還在國際政治中尋求更大的發言權，尤其是在氣候變化、貧困和發展援助等議題上。G7是否能夠適應這一變化，並有效地與全球南方國家進行對話，成為當前國際政治的重要議題。
briefing.analysis: G7面臨的挑戰主要來自於全球南方國家對其政策和決策過程的質疑。這些國家希望在全球治理中獲得更多的代表性和發言權，並對G7的傳統主導地位提出挑戰。隨著BRICS等新興力量的崛起，這種競爭將可能導致國際合作的重新評估。G7若無法有效回應全球南方的需求，可能會進一步削弱其在國際事務中的影響力。此外，全球南方國家之間的團結與合作也可能成為未來影響G7政策的重要因素，這一點在未來的國際會議中將更為明顯。

economy.title: Bank of England keeps interest rates at 3.75% as Iran conflict weighs on economy
economy.summary: Higher energy costs due to the closure of strait of Hormuz are expected to boost inflation and slow UK growth Business live – latest updates Bank of England policymakers have left interest rates on hold at 3.75%, as they continue to weigh the impact of the Iran conflict on the economy. The decision had been widely expected, even before Wednesday’s inflation figure undershot forecasts to remain at 2.8% in May. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Higher energy costs due to the closure of strait of Hormuz are expected to boost inflation and slow UK growth Business live – latest updates Bank of England policymakers have left interest rates on hold at 3.75%, as they continue to weigh the impact of the Iran conflict on the economy. The decision had been widely expected, even before Wednesday’s inflation figure undershot forecasts to remain at 2.8% in May. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國銀行決定將利率維持在3.75%，這一決策主要受到伊朗衝突影響的考量。由於霍爾木茲海峽的關閉導致能源成本上升，預計將進一步推高通脹並減緩英國經濟增長。這一決策在周三的通脹數據公布之前已經被廣泛預期，該數據顯示5月通脹率保持在2.8%，低於預期。
briefing.background: 英國銀行在12月最後一次降息後，面對中東局勢的不穩定，未來的降息計劃已經受到阻礙。霍爾木茲海峽的關閉不僅影響了能源供應，還可能導致整體經濟活動的減緩。根據最新報告，英國最大的零售商Tesco的銷售增長大幅放緩，顯示出家庭面臨的不確定性加劇，這進一步反映出中東局勢對英國經濟的潛在影響。
briefing.analysis: 英國銀行的決策反映了對當前經濟形勢的謹慎態度，尤其是在中東局勢不穩定的背景下。根據BBC的報導，自去年12月以來，英國銀行尚未進行任何降息，顯示出對未來經濟增長的擔憂。Tesco的銷售數據顯示，家庭消費者對經濟前景的信心下降，這可能進一步影響英國的經濟增長。不同報導中，BBC強調了中東動盪對利率政策的直接影響，而《衛報》則更著重於通脹預測的調整，這反映出各方對當前經濟挑戰的不同側重點。未來，若中東局勢持續緊張，英國的經濟增長可能會面臨更大挑戰。

supporting_titles: Interest rates kept on hold at 3.75%
Bank of England leaves interest rates on hold and lowers inflation forecast amid Middle East ‘uncertainty’ – business live
supporting_summaries: The Bank last cut interest rates in December but upheaval in the Middle East has stalled any further reductions.

Rolling coverage of the latest economic and financial news, including the latest UK jobs report and the Bank of England’s interest rate decision Tesco’s UK sales growth has more than halved as it said the conflict in the Middle East had created “ongoing uncertainty for many households”, knocking its shares in early trading. The UK’s biggest retailer said comparable sales rose 1.8% to £13.4bn in the three months to the end of May, below both the 4.2% reported in the previous quarter and the 2.3% growth City analysts had expected. Continue reading...

economy.title: What's happening to UK interest rates and what does it mean?
economy.summary: The interest rate set by the Bank of England affects mortgage, loan and savings rates for millions.

briefing.news_focus: The interest rate set by the Bank of England affects mortgage, loan and savings rates for millions.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國央行的利率變動對數百萬人的抵押貸款、貸款和儲蓄利率產生影響。這一政策決策將直接影響家庭的財務狀況，並可能引發更廣泛的經濟反應。
briefing.background: 英國央行的利率政策是影響國內經濟的重要工具。隨著通脹壓力的上升，央行可能會考慮調整利率以控制物價上漲。利率的變動不僅影響個人借貸成本，還會影響企業的融資條件，進而影響整體經濟增長。近年來，英國經濟面臨多重挑戰，包括脫歐後的貿易變化和全球供應鏈問題，這些因素都可能促使央行重新評估其利率政策。
briefing.analysis: 英國央行的利率決策將在家庭和企業之間引發不同的反應。對於依賴貸款的家庭來說，利率上升將增加其財務負擔，可能導致消費支出減少，進而影響經濟增長。另一方面，對於儲蓄者來說，利率上升可能帶來更高的回報，從而鼓勵儲蓄行為。市場分析師將密切關注央行的每次會議，因為這些決策將影響未來的經濟走向。此外，央行的利率政策也可能受到政治因素的影響，特別是在選舉年，政府可能會施壓以促進經濟增長。

economy.title: China touts new finance tools to fend off sanctions
economy.summary: Chinese officials outlined plans for new anti-sanctions measures and unveiled initiatives to boost international use of the yuan to policymakers and bankers gathered for the nation’s most important financial conference of the year. Vice-Premier He Lifeng highlighted a draft financial law he said would help fight “groundless suppression” of Chinese organisations and individuals through new blocking provisions and countermeasures. Authorities would add similar tools to other legislation to expand...

briefing.news_focus: Chinese officials outlined plans for new anti-sanctions measures and unveiled initiatives to boost international use of the yuan to policymakers and bankers gathered for the nation’s most important financial conference of the year. Vice-Premier He Lifeng highlighted a draft financial law he said would help fight “groundless suppression” of Chinese organisations and individuals through new blocking provisions and countermeasures. Authorities would add similar tools to other legislation to expand...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國官員在年度重要金融會議上提出新反制裁措施，並計劃推動人民幣的國際使用。副總理何立峰強調了一項草擬的金融法，旨在對抗對中國組織和個人的「無端打壓」，並引入新的阻止條款和反制措施。當局還計劃將類似工具納入其他立法，以擴大應對能力。
briefing.background: 隨著國際局勢的變化，中國面臨來自美國及其盟友的經濟制裁與貿易限制，這促使中國政府尋求新的金融工具來保護其國內經濟與企業。人民幣的國際化是中國政府的一項重要政策，旨在提升人民幣在全球貿易中的地位，減少對美元的依賴。此次會議的舉行正值全球經濟不確定性加劇之際，中國希望通過這些新措施來增強其金融體系的韌性。
briefing.analysis: 中國政府的這些新措施顯示出對外部壓力的反應，尤其是針對美國的制裁行動。副總理何立峰的發言強調了中國在面對國際挑戰時的堅定立場，並試圖通過立法手段來增強國內企業的保護。參考報導未直接提及此次會議，但提到中國的製造業成功可能會影響其他國家的市場空間，暗示中國在全球經濟中的競爭力。這表明，中國不僅在應對制裁上採取行動，也在積極尋求擴大其經濟影響力，這可能會引發其他國家的關注與反應。
